PAELCHARACTER-DORMANT.description: This card cannot be played and stays in your [gold]Hand[/gold] until it wakes up next turn.
PAELCHARACTER-DORMANT.title: Dormant
PAELCHARACTER-WAXED.description: When this card is played or exhausted, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and remove [gold]Waxed[/gold].
PAELCHARACTER-WAXED.title: Waxed
